message:
chore(deps): bump serde 1.0.219 → 1.0.228

Patch-level bump across the 1.0.x stream. Cargo.lock already resolved
to 1.0.228 transitively. serde 1.x upholds strict SemVer compatibility
at the derive + trait surface we use, so no source changes needed.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-types --lib` → 62 passed, 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
